{{Infobox character
| name = Orthos
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = sacred beast, Blackflame, guardian of the Arelius family, dragon-turtle, contracted partner
| abilities = Blackflame madra, Burning Cloak, Enforced paw, ruler technique, breathe fire
| affiliations = Arelius family, Blackflame family
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Orthos Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Orthos is a massive black turtle and a descendant of the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s royal black [[dragons]]. A long-standing and loyal ally to the [[Arelius family]], he previously acted as a mediator between them and the imperial [[Blackflame]] lineage. He is characterized by his immense size, dark eyes with red rings, and a shell that emits smoke and red light. Orthos possesses powerful [[madra]], capable of producing abyssal flames and devastating physical strikes, though he has previously suffered from exhaustion and injuries caused by overextending his abilities. Throughout his history, Orthos has undergone significant transformations. He can manifest in a human form—a man with dark, leathery skin and gray hair—though he often lacks grace in this state. He is also capable of reaching gargantuan proportions, growing to sizes comparable to a [[Dreadgod]] when fueled by [[soulfire]]. Despite his immense strength and prideful nature, he has faced periods of weakness and instability in his core. He is deeply connected to the city of [[Serpent's Grave]], which he once protected, and has spent much of his [[life]] studying the nature of [[dragons]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Orthos is a nearly three-hundred-year-old [[dragon]]-turtle and sacred beast who served as a liaison between the [[Arelius family]] and the imperial [[Blackflame]] line. Despite having survived three hundred winters and the fall of the Blackflames, the [[Truegold]]-level entity suffered from spiritual damage in his channels and a buildup of [[Blackflame madra]] that overwhelmed his mind. After receiving elixirs made from [[Riverseed]] power, the wounded beast's spirit improved, though he remained a hulking, armored creature with skin like leather that oozed dark blood. Following a contract made with [[Lindon]], the spirit of the turtle began to follow him and communicate through their bond.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] was a liaison between the Arelius and the imperial [[Blackflame family]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]'s [[madra]] overwhelmed his mind after overusing his power.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is plagued by a buildup of [[Blackflame madra]] in his system.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is almost three hundred years old.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a character who has been helped by elixirs made from [[Riverseed]] power.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]'s spirit feels like a boulder stopping up a volcano.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a [[dragon]]-turtle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]'s power is comparable to a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] was supposed to deliver a package to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has made a contract with [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a character that circles the mountain but stays away from the [[Trial]] grounds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] has a core that pulses with eagerness.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is an entity that can take a user to [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a giant turtle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]' spirit is in better shape than when [[Lindon]] first sensed it.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]' spirit contains a painful, burning heat that moves in regular cycles.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] suffers from spiritual damage built up in his channels.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] sprays [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] can be soothed by an [[Arelius family]] member who is not the [[Underlord]] without being killed.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Cassias]] sent a message about [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a sacred beast rated at [[Truegold]] strength.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]' body is blazing with the [[Burning Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] has thick skin like leather armor.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a hulking, burning, armored beast.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] uses an [[Enforced]] paw to crack the ground.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] has a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a wounded turtle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]]'s skin was oozing dark blood.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a turtle with a shell.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] possesses a ruler technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] has survived three hundred winters and the fall of the Blackflames.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] communicates through a contract.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is a spirit that follows [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Orthos]] is an Arelius turtle.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Orthos is a massive, black, leathery turtle and sacred beast that serves as the guardian of the [[Arelius family]]. As [[Lindon]]'s contracted partner, this [[Truegold]]-level creature possesses black eyes with red circles and a shell that smolders with dragonfire, emitting both smoke and a dull red light. Although the beast identifies as a [[dragon]] and feeds on fear, it is capable of withdrawing into its shell or extending its neck to crash through webs. During the course, [[Lindon]] rides Orthos, a beast that cycles [[Blackflame]] and possesses a core of rolling rage. While the creature cannot speak, it can breathe fire, snarl, and even consume items such as tapestry and pottery fragments.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] has black eyes with circles of red.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]]'s shell emits a dull red light and smoke.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a sacred beast and a turtle.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is the guardian of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] observes the fight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a massive black reptile with a shell that smolders with dragonfire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] provides heat to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] can withdraw into a shell.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a turtle and [[Lindon]]'s contracted partner.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] snorts smoke.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a character who follows [[Fisher Gesha]] and eats tapestry.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] could be used to ease a fight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a sacred beast that [[Lindon]] has fought against many times.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is currently under restraints.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a black, leathery turtle.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] burned a hole in a wall.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that feeds on fear.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that [[Lindon]] rides during the course.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] identifies as a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a contracted beast with power on the level of a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is cycling [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a creature with a shell and the ability to breathe fire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|He bent his knees as he hit the far wall, landing between [[Orthos]] and his pack.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a turtle with a core that feels rolling rage.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is [[Lindon]]'s contracted beast.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is waiting for [[Orthos]] to arrive.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a character that can crash through webs and snarl.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] cannot speak.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is a creature that can extend its neck from a shell.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Orthos]] is present and eating fragments of pottery.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Orthos is a [[Truegold]]-level turtle characterized by a deep red shell that stands as high as a horse's back and black eyes containing rings of red. This creature can release flares of [[Blackflame madra]], launch [[dragon]]'s breath, and whip its tail, though a recent battle left his shell cracked and his spirit throbbing with deep pain. While unconscious and weak, he communicated with [[Lindon]] through a direct spiritual line to provide training on the [[Path of Black Flame]] and instructions on converting [[aura]] into [[madra]]. After his spirit was cleansed and improved by the [[Spirit Well]], Orthos remained near [[Lindon]] to provide him with power. Now standing one step away from breaking through to [[Underlord]], the turtle can retreat inside his shell and command others.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a turtle with black eyes containing rings of red.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] growled loudly enough to make the sand shake.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] can launch [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] has a shell.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] can release flares of [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]' shell is as high as a horse's back and almost as wide as he is tall.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] has a cracked shell.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is alive but unconscious and weak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]'s eyes smolder with orange-red light.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] had a plan that consisted of hitting something with an arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] instructed [[Lindon]] on how to draw [[aura]] and convert it to [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]'s soul is damaged and weak.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] provides words that bolster [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] has trained [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] taught [[Lindon]] about the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] steps into the water.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] has a deep red shell.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a capable swimmer whose feet act like flippers.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]'s spirit was throbbing with deep pain after his battle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a turtle whose spirit is improving from the [[Spirit Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is nearby [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]' spirit has been cleansed.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] can communicate with [[Lindon]] through a direct line to his spirit.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a creature with the power of a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] provides power to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] hit the ground shell-first.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is one step away from breaking through to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a creature that can whip its tail.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]]'s [[Burning Cloak]] is dying.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that can retreat inside its shell and command others.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While stationed on the deck with [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]], the broad black turtle known as Orthos roared during the [[Truegold]] advance. This entity, who smolders with [[Blackflame]] and can blow smoke or breathe black-and-red fire, even bit off techniques and stomped on a fleeing man. As a smoldering red presence existing within [[Lindon]]'s soul, Orthos observed that [[Skysworn armor]] left the head unprotected. Although he could use water from the [[Life Well]], Orthos eventually rumbled in response to [[Eithan]] before departing for several years. His absence caused [[Lindon]] significant distress and fear of permanent loss, as the creature who identifies himself as Orthos had already been gone for a month.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]] clings to the top of [[Orthos]]' head.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] roared during the [[Truegold]] advance.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] has black-and-red [[dragon]] breath.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] can bite off techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is a character mentioned as being up on the deck with [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] can blow smoke.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] smolders with [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] comments on the [[Skysworn armor]] leaving the head unprotected.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] stomped on a fleeing man.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] exists within [[Lindon]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] does not have Thousand-Mile Clouds stored in his emerald armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] rumbled in response to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is a broad, black turtle that exists as a smoldering red presence in [[Lindon]]'s soul.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is leaving for a few years.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] left one month ago.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]]'s departure caused [[Lindon]] to become worked up.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] can use water from the [[Life Well]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is afraid that [[Orthos]] will never return.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is a person [[Lindon]] fears losing.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] is gone.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] identifies himself as [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]] comes from [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|A sacred turtle and descendant of the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s black [[dragons]], Orthos once held the rank of [[Truegold]] before the era of [[Kelsa]]'s grandparents. Since his arrival, however, his power has steadily leaked away until he reached no higher than a [[Jade]]. His eyes bear a striking resemblance to those of the black [[dragons]] from his lineage. Following treatment involving [[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]] and [[Little Blue]], Orthos was briefly restored to his former self.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Orthos]] is a sacred turtle and a descendant of the black [[dragons]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Orthos]]'s power has leaked away since his arrival and he is currently no higher than a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Orthos]] was a [[Truegold]] before [[Kelsa]]'s grandparents were born.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The black [[dragon]]'s eyes are compared to [[Orthos]]'.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Orthos]] was briefly returned to himself after treatment from [[Little Blue]] and [[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Orthos]] is a creature that can shove wooden beams with one foreleg.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Orthos]] is a character who hates waiting for no reason.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located in the western [[Blackflame Empire]], Orthos is a turtle who once spent time in [[Sacred Valley]] sharing stories about [[Lindon]] and [[sacred artists]]. Initially appearing as an indistinct lump within [[Lindon]]'s mind, the [[Underlord]] eventually resided at the [[Fallen Leaf School]] among the exiles. This creature, capable of producing earthquake-like sounds and stretching his head to reach tables, observed the existence of two [[Dreadgods]] and led [[Lindon]]'s family into a fortress. While eating firewood and wooden chests, Orthos used treasures from [[Lindon's void key]] to advance, causing his presence in [[Lindon]]'s spirit to grow brighter and stronger. Now a struggling creature held by the [[Titan]], Orthos possesses a shell that emits smoke and can expand his size by filling his body with [[soulfire]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a turtle located in the western [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is an indistinct lump in the back of [[Lindon]]'s mind.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] has spent time in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] told stories about [[sacred artists]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a character [[Lindon]] mentions.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] was sitting with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that can make sounds like an earthquake.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is capable of stretching out his head to reach a table.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is capable of radiating concern.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is affected by the [[earth aura]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is associated with the exiles at the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is located at the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] observed that there are two [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] leads [[Lindon]]'s family inside the fortress.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] told [[Lindon]] that he saved lives.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] was eating firewood.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a creature with a shell that can emit smoke.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is an outsider to [[Lindon]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] eats wooden chests.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]]' presence in [[Lindon]]’s spirit was brighter and stronger than ever.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] used treasures from [[Lindon's void key]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a turtle whose body fills with [[soulfire]] to expand his size.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Orthos]] is a struggling creature being held by the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Once a hill-sized flaming turtle, the [[Lord]] spirit Orthos underwent a transformation that left him as a tiny red-and-black turtle with glowing red plates and black, pebbly skin. While accompanying [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], this weak spirit often stayed within the [[Dawn Sky Palace]] or perched upon [[Lindon]]'s shoulder, where he would eat hammers and plants. Despite being too injured to assist in an abandoned laboratory, Orthos later helped [[Lindon]] with a wall under [[Eithan]]'s orders and demonstrated the ability to transfer his power. He proved his utility by using [[soulfire]] to influence mind [[aura]] and blow away [[dream aura]] near the [[Nethergate]]. Ultimately, [[Lindon]] was forced to leave him behind, and Orthos was later found among the captives held by [[Mercy]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a spirit that is currently weak.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a flaming turtle the size of a hill.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a [[Lord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] has undergone a transformation and is currently the size of an ordinary turtle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]]'s shell has glowing red plates.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a tiny red-and-black turtle on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a creature that accompanies [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] stays inside the [[Dawn Sky Palace]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] was too injured to help [[Lindon]] in an abandoned laboratory.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a character [[Lindon]] intends to tell about [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is on [[Lindon]]'s shoulders.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] questioned [[Eithan]]'s plan.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a creature that hops on [[Lindon]]'s shoulder and eats hammers.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] felt something stirring in its sleep.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] grumbled about being put down.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] breathes flame.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] can emit a red-and-black glare.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] burned blood away.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] has black, pebbly skin.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is present in the room.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] orders [[Orthos]] to help [[Lindon]] with the wall.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] hid [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] ate [[Lindon]]'s plants and pots.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] glared at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] spoke from [[Yerin]]’s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] can transfer his power to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is mentioned by [[Ziel]] in relation to an idea.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] approaches the [[Nethergate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a character who can blow away [[dream aura]] with his [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] is a character who can use [[soulfire]] to influence the [[aura]] of his mind.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was forced to leave [[Orthos]] behind.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] was one of the captives.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] was being held by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] felt shock.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] grumbled to [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An [[Archlord]] hailing from Serpent’s [[Grave]], the turtle Orthos serves as a companion to [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]]. While he possesses the ability to absorb constructs and ignite the [[Burning Cloak]], his proximity to [[Lindon]] places him in danger from the [[Dreadgod]]. Seeking to claim his inheritance by finding his ancestors' tomb, this confident being is one of six entities threatened by the [[Silent King]]. Orthos eventually becomes buried beneath [[Shatterspine Castle]] alongside [[Ziel]], where he maintains a collection of [[Remnants]] including one [[Archlord]] black [[dragon]], a [[Herald]], and various other subordinates.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is not safe from the [[Dreadgod]] because he is close to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is one of the six beings threatened by the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] eats apples.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] can absorb constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] comes from Serpent’s [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] chewed on a remaining piece of apple stem.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] and [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is a character who believes they can handle themselves.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] seeks to find the tomb of his ancestors and claim his inheritance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is a character whose gaze was passed over by an unnamed individual.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that can ignite the [[Burning Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is associated with an ancient castle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] is a turtle buried under [[Shatterspine Castle]] with [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] chuckled at the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Orthos]] has one [[Archlord]] black [[dragon]] [[Remnant]], two [[Overlords]], six Underlords, fifteen [[Golds]], and one [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After entering a pocket world through a doorway, the four-footed turtle Orthos accompanied [[Lindon]] and [[Little Blue]] while carrying a [[void key]]. During training, the smoke-snorting creature provided encouragement but collapsed after being reeling from the impact of foreign willpower. Orthos eventually reached the peak of [[Overlord]] and trained in [[Ghostwind Hall]] before being sealed away to train alongside [[Little Blue]]. Having ascended to the rank of [[Archlord]], Orthos transformed into a human with wrinkled black skin, gray hair, and black-and-red eyes. As a newborn [[Herald]] bound to the [[Dreadgods]], he fought alongside [[Lindon]] against the [[Weeping Dragon]], utilizing [[soulfire]], [[life]] and blood [[aura]], and [[dragon]]'s breath infused with the Void and Dragon [[Icons]]. In later events, he used [[Blackflame claws]] to crush techniques and assisted [[Lindon]] by drawing from his cores.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] entered the pocket world through a doorway.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] carries a [[void key]] for [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is a turtle that can snort smoke.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is present with [[Lindon]] and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] collapsed during the test.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is a turtle who provides encouragement during training.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] has four feet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] was reeling from the impact of foreign willpower.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is a source of concern for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] fought alongside [[Little Blue]] against a single opponent.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] used lances of [[dragon]]'s breath and his shell to attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] trains in [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] has reached the peak of [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] gave advice to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] were sealed away training together.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] was wrestling against the mind and spirit of another while trying not to lose himself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] are Archlords.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is a human with wrinkled black skin and gray hair.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] can spit a burst of fire madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] was embarrassed to tie with [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is a newborn [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] clashed against the [[Weeping Dragon]] with [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] behind him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] crushed [[Striker techniques]] in his hands.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] were too weak to fight the [[Weeping Dragon]] alone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] shot [[dragon’s breath]] that had a touch of the Void and Dragon [[Icons]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] struck the Dragon with a massive [[dragon’s breath]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is bound to the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] experienced a sensation in his mind that caused the world around him to seem to slow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] unleashed techniques to block the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]'s role was to keep the storm or movement of the [[Weeping Dragon]] from killing [[Orthos]], [[Little Blue]], [[Mercy]], or [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]]'s shadows crept up to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] used [[life]] and blood [[aura]] and [[soulfire]] to keep [[Ziel]]'s body going.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] stepped away from [[Ziel]] in relief after he was healed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] would have a difficult time establishing authority over the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] has a human body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] pointed out that no one asked if [[Dross]] was worried.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] is present during [[Mercy]]'s preparation.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] watched [[Mercy]] with a flat look.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] blasted a [[construct]] apart with [[dragon’s breath]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] spoke gravely.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] has black-and-red eyes and uses [[Blackflame claws]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] drew from [[Lindon]]'s cores.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] rumbled and chewed a handful of gravel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] can snort smoke from his nose.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] flanks [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Orthos is an elder [[dragon]] and [[Dreadgod]] characterized by leathery skin, gray-winged hair, and dark eyes containing rings of red. This barrier [[island]] [[dragon]]-turtle travels with [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]], often residing in a shell on [[Ziel]]'s shoulder or growing large enough to match [[G-42]]. During missions, the creature can call down tornadoes of black fire, blow jets of flame, and land amidst pulses of black-and-red fire. Orthos is capable of shifting into a human form as a black-skinned man with gray hair and has even brought a clutch of [[dragon]] eggs to accompany the group. While [[Pride]] was advised not to listen to this entity, Orthos has contributed to the journey by suggesting the world be named [[Windfall]] after their former ship.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] has leathery skin and gray-winged hair.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]]'s eyes are dark orbs with rings of red.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is someone [[Pride]] was advised not to listen to.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is a creature that lives in a shell on [[Ziel]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] can blow jets of fire.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is a barrier [[island]] [[dragon]]-turtle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] can land in a pulse of black-and-red fire.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] smolders like a live coal and has black-and-red eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is a [[dragon]]-turtle.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is a [[dragon]] that travels with [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] can stay in a larger size and hear people inside buildings.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] is an elder [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] can call down a tornado of black fire.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] grew large enough to match [[G-42]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] teaches [[dragons]] that they shouldn't whine.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] accompanied [[Ziel]] on a mission.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] can shift into a human form of a black-skinned, gray-haired man.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] blew out a mouthful of smoke.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] brought a clutch of [[dragon]] eggs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] told [[Dross]] not to make up words.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Orthos]] suggested naming the world [[Windfall]] after their former ship.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"Long before my time as Patriarch, Orthos served as a liaison between the Arelius and the imperial Blackflame family."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"Orthos’ own madra overwhelmed his mind."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"And Eithan moved forward, shoving the sacred beast's mouth closed with both hands."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The sacred beast snorted, pulling back. “Cycle Blackflame and say that to me again.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“A good fight is a short fight,” Orthos said.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Arelius family]]
[[Category:Blackflame family]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
